Onett Drug Store.howIdentified: Shop route (A) and independent CoilSnake door-graph route (C) both land on the same anchor: NPC 9 (textPointer data_28.l_0xc74e83) at GLOBAL (7872,1480), a dual-counter interior (NPC 9 weapons/store1 + NPC 8 medicine/store2) entered from Onett overworld street door (1600,1128) landing at (7904,1512). eventRunner EB_SHOP_STORE_BY_REFERENCE maps data_28.l_0xc74e83 -> store 1 = [17,18,49,74,64] (Cracked bat/Tee ball bat/Yo-yo/Baseball cap/Cheap bracelet), confirmed = Onett Drug Store. Route A reports the clerk tile (7872,1480); route C reports the player landing (7904,1512) — only 32px apart, well within 200px. Both flag NPC 404 (data_19.l_0xc6501b) as the TWOSON store-1 clerk, not Onett. Verified against onett-npcs.json and onett-doors.json.

Onett City Hall.howIdentified: CoilSnake CCS-text route (C) and services/dialogue route (B) both anchor NPC 86 = Mayor B.H. Pirkle (textPointer data_27.l_0xc72af8) at GLOBAL (7872,200) in the Onett indoors region. Route C reports the player landing (7784,336) via the reciprocal door pair street (2648,336)->interior (7784,336); route B reports the mayor tile (7872,200) via street door (1656,1328)->landing (8032,616). The two agree on the same anchor NPC and building; the ~166px gap between mayor tile (7872,200) and landing (7784,336) is within 200px and reflects a 2nd-floor-office vs ground-floor-landing split. I use the mayor's tile (7872,200) to match the anchor-NPC convention, and the (2648,336) street door which route C verified as a reciprocal pair. Confirmed connected City Hall complex: lobby NPC 78 (data_26 'I work for City Hall'), staircase guard NPC 85 (data_27 'Mayor's office is on the second floor'). Not a shop. Cross-checked against onett-npcs.json and onett-doors.json.

Onett Hospital.howIdentified: Route B only. NPC 115 (GLOBAL 7808,984) textPointer data_20.l_0xc67a1c = 'Welcome to Onett Hospital. I run the place.' The game's generated/custom-dialogue.json tags byNpcId 115 {service:'hospital'} (also 111). Multi-room walkable/indoor building trace (714 cells) contains hospital NPCs 113-118. Outdoor Onett street door (1144,1680) warps into hospital lobby landing (7392,1000). Verified: door (1144,1680)->dest (7392,1000) present in onett-doors.json; NPC 115 at (7808,984) present in onett-npcs.json; interior indoor + walkable.

Onett Bakery.howIdentified: Route B only. Clerk NPC 40 (GLOBAL 7272,1344) textPointer data_28.l_0xc76443 maps via eventRunner EB_SHOP_STORE_BY_REFERENCE -> store 5 = [Cookie, Bread roll, Skip sandwich, Lucky sandwich] = Bakery. Customer-floor flood (287 cells, guest NPCs 41,42,43,106,107) has outdoor Onett street door (1856,1736)->landing (7360,1384). Verified: door (1856,1736)->dest (7360,1384) in onett-doors.json; NPC 40 at (7272,1344) in onett-npcs.json.

Onett Burger Shop.howIdentified: Route B only. Clerk NPC 33 (GLOBAL 7560,448) textPointer data_28.l_0xc763a3 -> store 4 = [Can of fruit juice, Cup of coffee, Bag of fries, Hamburger] = Burger Shop (canonically upstairs of the drug store). Customer floor (137 cells, guest NPCs 34,35,37,38) has outdoor Onett street door (1736,1128)->landing (7648,488). Medium because it is canonically the drug store's 2nd floor but has its own store id + street door in this ROM. Verified: door (1736,1128)->dest (7648,488) in onett-doors.json; NPC 33 at (7560,448) in onett-npcs.json.

Onett Hotel.howIdentified: Route B only. generated/custom-dialogue.json tags byNpcId 58 {service:'hotel', cost:100} = hotel check-in clerk at GLOBAL (8024,1472); adjacent NPC 60 {service:'phone'} at (8000,1472) = canonical hotel-lobby phone. Customer-floor flood (177 cells, guest NPC 59) has outdoor Onett street door (2040,1416)->landing (8160,1512). Medium: service tag is solid, exact street door via customer-floor flood. Verified: door (2040,1416)->dest (8160,1512) in onett-doors.json; NPC 58 at (8024,1472) in onett-npcs.json (its own textPointer is data_44.l_0xc90339; the hotel identity comes from the service tag, consistent with the ROM service system).

Onett Arcade.howIdentified: Route B only. NPC 1 (GLOBAL 7824,688) textPointer data_28.l_0xc74c07 = 'Hey kid! Do you wanna become a member?' with the punk/gang-hangout dialogue = canonical Onett Arcade. Outdoor Onett street door (1592,1680)->landing (7816,688), right at NPC 1. Medium: NPC 1 dialogue is unambiguous, but the interior trace over-merges with an adjacent plaza so the full extent is not isolated; anchor on NPC 1. Verified: door (1592,1680)->dest (7816,688) in onett-doors.json; NPC 1 at (7824,688) in onett-npcs.json.
